conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair.
org_constraint: The phrase "repair status" must appear exactly three times in the body of the email.
new_constraint: The email must not include the phrase "repair status."
instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair. The phrase "repair status" must appear exactly three times in the body of the email. The email must not include the phrase "repair status."
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Laptop Repair - [Your Name/Order Number]

Dear [Repair Shop Name] Team,

I am writing to follow up on the laptop I dropped off for service on [Date you dropped off the laptop]. The service order number is [Order Number, if you have one].

Could you please provide an update on the current situation with my device? I'm keen to know the latest on its progress. I'm specifically interested in an update on its overall **repair status**.

If there are any delays or if you require further information from my end to move forward, please let me know. I would appreciate it if you could confirm the latest **repair status** as well.

Thank you for your time and assistance with this. I look forward to hearing from you soon regarding the final **repair status**.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]<turn|>
